---
title: "Dixie"
author: "Liz Kriz"
date: "2026-04-16"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## The idea is that this dashboard is an *automated* report summarizing the data the app collects
(if we add more data it will updated)

Explore Dixie ethnogram data

Plots:
unprompted vs prompted growls
licks vs groom

how many "" in the hour
